ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chatbot_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "chatbot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chatbot involved in the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's query or message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  "occurrence" INTEGER /* Number of times this interaction has occurred */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response provided by the chatbot */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session the interaction is part of */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Communication channel (e.g., web, mobile app, SMS) */,
  "user_message_type" TEXT /* Type of user message (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken for the chatbot to respond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chatbot_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chatbot_interactions_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chatbot_interactions_chatbot_id FOREIGN KEY ("chatbot_id") REFERENCES chatbots ("chatbot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chatbots" (
  "chatbot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chatbot */,
  "chatbot_name" TEXT /* Name of the chatbot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chatbot's purpose and features */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chatbot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the chatbot was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the chatbot (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the chatbot */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the chatbot */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the chatbot was last modified */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language the chatbot is written in */,
  "intents_supported" TEXT /* List of intents or use cases the chatbot supports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chatbot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, content manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the user was active */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred language, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the chatbot's response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was last updated */,
  "response_category" TEXT /* Category of the response (e.g., informational, instructional, promotional) */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of the response (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the response */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., query, command, feedback) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a default interaction type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction category (e.g., technical, general, product) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a default interaction category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being logged */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction category */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or context about the interaction */,
  "interaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction (e.g., resolved, pending, escalated) */,
  "interaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction (e.g., user, API) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES chatbot_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES interaction_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being reviewed */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who will follow up */,
  "follow_up_at" TEXT /* Date and time for follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES chatbot_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
